chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5934 of 2024: Waseem Mustafa vs. Chief Executive Officer & Others For the Petitioner/s: Mr. Zubaida K. Jamali, Advocate For the Respondent/s: Mr. Mohammed Ali Lakhani, Advocate Ms. Bushra Salahuddin, Advocate Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General of Pakistan Date/s of hearing: 13.12.2024 Date of announcement: 13.12.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner is represented to have a contractual relationship with the respondent public listed company and seeks issuance of a writ there against predicated upon disputed questions of fact, requiring inquiry, investigation and / or evidence. Learned counsel remained unable to satisfy the Court with respect to maintainability, inter alia in terms aforesaid, hence, this petition is found to be misconceived. Therefore, the petition is dismissed. The petitioner remains at liberty to agitate any grievance before the forum of appropriate jurisdiction, subject to the law. Judge Judge
